title: Enchantment Extraction
description: Enchantment Extraction lets you recover enchantments from tools and weapons you no longer want, so valuable enchants are never wasted.
body:
# Enchantment Extraction

Turn your enchanted gear back into enchanted books through a ritual.

Extraction Ritual lets you recover enchantments from tools and weapons you no longer want, so valuable enchants are never wasted.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZCbedL9b/images/f5c3749060b00d96d9edcad95d3d3e380b87ed79.gif)

## What It Does

- Recovers enchantments from enchanted tools and weapons
- Creates enchanted books you can use again on new gear


## How It Works

1. Gather your enchanted item and ritual materials. (Book and Enchanted tool)
2. Begin the ritual.
3. Hold your position and let ritual finish.
4. Receive enchanted books from extracted power.

If you move away too soon, ritual fails and you must start again.

## Ritual Style

This pack is designed to feel like in-world magic, not a menu shortcut

- Clear ritual start and completion feedback
- Distinct atmosphere during extraction



## Version Support
This project includes separate versions so players on different Minecraft releases can use the same core ritual experience.
